title: Apartment Listing
text:
## Apartment Listing

Now leasing a {adjective} studio in the heart of {place}.

This unit features {number} windows, one {color} wall, and a surprisingly {adjective} view of the neighbor's {object}.

Amenities include:
- Shared {plural noun}
- A lobby that smells faintly of {food}
- On-site {animal} supervision

Ideal for a {job} who loves {verb ending in -ing} and can {verb} quietly after midnight.

Security deposit: one {adjective} {noun}, a {body part} print, {number} references, and a promise to stay {emotion} by {day of week}.
